title: The Great Gatsby
desc: Nick Carraway arrives in New York in 1922. Chasing his own American Dream, Nick is drawn into the captivating world of the super-rich, their illusions, loves and deceits.

title: Angels & Demons
desc: When Robert Langdon, a symbologist, learns about the revival of a secret organisation aiming to destroy the Vatican, he immediately joins forces with a scientist to stop the attack.

title: The Big Short
desc: Defying market reasoning, a few shrewd but oddball fund managers and traders bet against the US mortgage system's stability. They are predicting its collapse, but the unforeseen consequences prove devastating.

title: Knives Out
desc: When a renowned novelist passes unexpectedly, a detective scrutinises the family, uncovering tangled relationships and hidden agendas.

title: Erin Brockovich
desc: Erin Brockovich lands a job as a legal assistant at Ed Masry's law firm. Here, she builds a case against a power company after she learns that they have been polluting a town's water supply.

title: Revolutionary Road
desc: A near-perfect couple decides to transfer to Paris in order to escape their satiated lives. But their relationship starts to strain when the woman's pregnancy forces them to change their plan.

title: Revolutionary Road
desc: A near-perfect couple decides to transfer to Paris in order to escape their satiated lives. But their relationship starts to strain when the woman's pregnancy forces them to change their plan.

title: Serena
desc: In Depression-era North Carolina, the future of George Pemberton's timber empire becomes complicated when he marries Serena.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: The Da Vinci Code
desc: A dying curator of the Louvre hides cryptic clues on Da Vinci paintings. Now it is up to Robert Langdon and Sophie Neveu to follow the clues and unearth a secret kept hidden for centuries.

title: Speed Kills
desc: Wealthy speedboat racer Ben Aronoff leads a secret life that lands him in trouble with both law enforcement and drug lords.

title: The Frozen Ground
desc: An Alaska State Trooper partners with a young woman who escaped the clutches of serial killer Robert Hansen to bring the murderer to justice. Based on actual events.

title: The Fugitive
desc: A man wrongly accused of killing his wife races to find the real killer while a determined U.S. Marshal attempts to nab him.

title: Spotlight
desc: Martin Baron joins the Boston Globe as an editor and pushes four journalists to pursue a story about the child molestation charges against the local church.

title: Julie & Julia
desc: Julie Powell, a young blogger, is determined to emulate Julia Child's cooking techniques. Though separated by time, the two women share a common passion for food that intertwines their lives.

title: The Pursuit of Happyness
desc: Tired of Chris's professional failures, his wife decides to separate, leaving him financially broke with an unpaid internship in a brokerage firm and his son's custody to deal with.

title: The Company You Keep
desc: Grant, a wanted man and a former member of the revolutionary militant group, the Weather Underground, goes on the run after a journalist reveals his identity.

title: The Pianist
desc: A Jewish musician's privileged lifestyle comes to an end with the Nazi invasion of Germany, following which he must endure the horrors of the Holocaust.

title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
desc: Rick, a fading actor, and Cliff, his stunt double, struggle to find relevant work in Hollywood and go through various twists and turns in order to restart their careers.

title: King Richard
desc: Equipped with an elaborate plan, clear vision and unwavering determination, Richard Williams, a sports coach, encourages his daughters, Venus and Serena, to become tennis champions.
